text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to see and understand visual information from the world. Two important tasks in this field are image recognition, where a computer identifies what is in a picture, and object detection, which locates specific items within an image. These technologies have many applications in daily life, such as in smartphones for face unlocking or in medical imaging for diagnosing diseases. One of the most exciting uses is in self-driving cars. These vehicles use computer vision to recognize traffic signs, detect pedestrians, and avoid obstacles, making driving safer and more efficient.
